---
title: "About"
lang: en
image: image.jpg
language: 
    en:
      title-block-published: "About"
comments: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/public-profile/settings?trk=d_flagship3_profile_self_view_public_profile
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/GabrielPalucci
---

```{=html}

    <style>
        body {
            font-family: sans-serif;
            text-align: justify;
          
        }
    </style>
<body>
    <p><b>Hello my name is Gabriel Palucci Rosa and <b>welcome</b> to my blog.</b> I seek to bring content about science, discussion about soil science and, mainly, reflections/stories about some fieldwork.
    
    I am an R software enthusiast, and one of the reasons for creating the blog is to maintain constant use and learn new functions.  </p>
</body>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

| {{< fa book-open >}}<b> Formação Acadêmica</b>

-   Degree in <mark>Geography</mark> from the Federal University of Uberlândia

-   Master\`s degree in <mark>Geography</mark> from the Federal University of Uberlândia

-   PhD student in <mark>Soil and Plant Nutrition</mark> at the Federal University of Viçosa
